retry_reason: Release is unconditional and may free the object; retrying would cause use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that decrements the reference count on the bpf_nf_link's associated namespace. After calling this function, the link object must not be used further. The caller's reference to the link is released; if the refcount reaches zero, the underlying resources may be freed. There is no error return; the function always succeeds.
